description:
Captions: English, Russian, Italian

Spiritual Virus | Die to Live

Even remote contact with a very powerful virus can infect someone. A microscopic amount of some substance can enter your system and completely alter you, bring to a stage of mortality.

Some microscopic amount of spiritual substance can enter within you and take you to the immortal plane.

fragments from video — "You are the Movie | Spiritual Virus" — https://youtu.be/x22sCFwoDaQ
full video — "Potency of Love" — https://youtu.be/Yt7eBnM-UGc

“Beauty Over Power” is a TheoPhilosophical talk show featuring Bhakti Sudhir Goswami. 
https://youtube.com/BeautyOverPower
https://soundcloud.com/BeautyOverPower
